docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCEIS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VADIM KAZAKEVICH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT KAZAKEVICH, VADIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSUARANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $90.00) SERVED DEC-24-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KAZAKEVICH, VADIM
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
